nasb.text: In the wilderness He fed you manna which your fathers did not know, that He might humble you and that He might test you, to do good for you in the end.

esv.text: who fed you in the wilderness with manna that your fathers did not know, that he might humble you and test you, to do you good in the end.

cnv.text: 他在曠野把你的列祖不認識的嗎哪賜給你吃，是要使你受苦，要試煉你，使你終久得到福樂；

ccb.text: 在旷野中把你们祖先从未见过的吗哪赐给你们吃，为要磨炼你们、考验你们，使你们最终得到益处。
